# Website SEO Auditor

> Free tool that scans any public website and reports what you have and what's missing for SEO, performance, security, and accessibility.

## Docs

- [Homepage](/): Run a website audit
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How we handle data
- [About](/about): About this tool

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/Samson397/Website-seo): Source code
